name: Pitch Black
description: Permanent Curse of Darkness. Navigate in near-total darkness.

name: High Brow
description: Start with a poop-themed loadout. Number One + E. Coli + Butt Bombs + Flush! + Petrified Poop.

name: Head Trauma
description: Start with Tiny Planet, Soy Milk, Iron Bar, and The Small Rock. Tears orbit around you with very high fire rate but low damage.

name: Darkness Falls
description: Play as Eve with extra devil items. Start with Razor Blade, Dark Matter, Pentagram, and Sacrificial Dagger.

name: The Tank
description: Very slow but tanky. Magdalene with Thunder Thighs, Bucket of Lard, and Infamy.

name: Solar System
description: Orbital-only run. Blindfolded — rely entirely on orbitals for damage. Start with Distant Admiration, Forever Alone, Halo of Flies, and Transcendence.

name: Suicide King
description: Play as Lazarus. Start with Ipecac, My Reflection, and Mr. Mega. Explosive tears boomerang back toward you. Extremely dangerous.

name: Cat Got Your Tongue
description: Guppy transformation from the start. Blindfolded — flies do the damage. Start with Guppy's Tail, Guppy's Head, and Guppy's Hairball.

name: Demo Man
description: Start with Dr. Fetus, Remote Detonator, and Match Stick. All tears are bombs you control.

name: Cursed!
description: Play as Magdalene. Permanent Curse of the Labyrinth — every floor is an XL floor. Start with Treasure Map, Compass, Blue Map, Raw Liver, and Child's Heart.

name: Glass Cannon
description: Play as Judas. Start with Epic Fetus and Loki's Horns. One-hit potential but extremely fragile.

name: When Life Gives You Lemons
description: Start with Lemon Mishap, Habit, 9 Volt, and a Lemon Party pill. Lemon-themed run.

name: Beans!
description: Bean-themed run. Start with Butt Bombs, Pyro, The Black Bean, The Bean, and 9 Volt.

name: It's in the Cards
description: Start with Starter Deck, Deck of Cards, 9 Volt, The Battery, and a random card. Use cards to survive.

name: Slow Roll
description: Start with Polyphemus, Cupid's Arrow, and My Reflection. Huge slow piercing tears.

name: Computer Savvy
description: Start with Technology, Technology 2, and Spoon Bender. Laser loadout.

name: Waka Waka
description: Start with Strange Attractor and Anti-Gravity. Tears pull enemies.

name: The Host
description: Start with The Mulligan, Spiderbaby, and The Tick. Blindfolded — familiars fight for you.

name: The Family Man
description: Blindfolded. Start with Dad's Key, Sister Maggy, Brother Bobby, Rotten Baby, and BFFS! Familiars do all the damage.

name: Purist
description: No item rooms spawn at all. You only get boss items and any pickups you find. Pure skill and resource management.

name: XXXXXXXXL
description: Every floor is the size of an XL Womb floor. Massive floors to explore.

name: SPEED!
description: Enemies are sped up, Isaac moves faster. Must clear rooms quickly.
unlock: Get Out of Jail Free Card

name: Blue Bomber
description: Play as ???. Start with Kamikaze!, Mr. Mega, Pyromaniac, and Brother Bobby. Bomb yourself to heal.

name: PAY TO PLAY
description: All doors cost a coin. Start with Sack of Pennies and Money = Power. Having 0 coins kills you. Taking damage drops coins.

name: Have a Heart
description: All red heart pickups are replaced with coins. HP up items no longer heal. Start with Charm of the Vampire.

name: I RULE!
description: Zelda-themed. Start with Mom's Knife, Trinity Shield, The Boomerang, The Ladder, and both Key Pieces.

name: BRAINS!
description: Play as ???. Blindfolded with 3 Bob's Brains and Thunder Thighs. Brains do all damage.

name: PRIDE DAY!
description: Start with Rainbow Baby, 3 Dollar Bill, and Rainbow Worm (can't be dropped). No treasure rooms.

name: Onan's Streak
description: Play as Judas with Chocolate Milk and +2 damage. Missing a shot deals half a heart of damage. Aim carefully.

name: The Guardian
description: Blindfolded. Isaac's Heart follows Punching Bag instead of you. Start with Holy Grail and Spear of Destiny. Protect the heart.

name: Backasswards
description: Start from Mega Satan with 8-10 random items. Each floor you go backwards, losing a heart container and your oldest item. Floors go in reverse order.

name: Aprils Fool
description: Every floor boss is The Bloat. All items, trinkets, pickups display incorrect sprites. Active items trigger random effects. Your map position is randomized.
unlock: Magdalene starts with Full Health pill

name: Pokey Mans
description: Blindfolded. Start with Mom's Eyeshadow and Friendly Ball. Friendly Ball spawns random friendly monsters instead of capturing. Auto-recharges when the monster dies.

name: Ultra Hard
description: No heart drops at all. All enemies are champions. Boss fights are double trouble. Start with both Key Pieces. Must defeat Mega Satan.
restrictions: No heart drops of any kind

name: Pong
description: Blindfolded. Start with Cupid's Arrow and Rubber Cement. High range, bouncing piercing tears.

name: Scat Man
description: Poop-themed run. Start with Skatole, The Poop, E. Coli, Butt Bombs, BFFS!, Thunder Thighs, Dirty Mind, 9 Volt, and Mysterious Candy.

name: Bloody Mary
description: Play as Bethany (without Book of Virtues). Start with Book of Belial, Blood Bag, Anemic, Blood Oath, and Child's Heart.

name: Baptism by Fire
description: Play as Bethany (without Book of Virtues). Start with Schoolbag, Guppy's Paw, Urn of Souls, and Maggy's Faith.

name: Isaac's Awakening
description: Zelda-inspired. Start with Spirit Sword, Mom's Bracelet, and Trinity Shield.

name: Seeing Double
description: Play as Jacob & Esau. Both start with 20/20. All enemies and bosses are doubled.

name: Pica Run
description: Start with Mom's Purse, Marbles, and Mom's Box. All items are replaced with trinkets. Marbles activates on every hit.

name: Hot Potato
description: Play as Tainted Forgotten. The Forgotten explodes every 2.5 seconds, damaging The Soul.

name: Cantripped
description: Play as Tainted Cain. Cards and pills replaced with Item Cards. Bag of Crafting starts with 3 card slots. Every item replaced by Starter Deck which grants +1 slot and spawns 3 Item Cards.

name: Red Redemption
description: Play as Tainted Jacob with Dad's Key. Rooms must be found via Red Key. After 20 uses, Dark Esau spawns. Every 5 more uses spawns another. XL floors with scattered room clusters.

name: DELETE THIS
description: Play as Isaac with TMTRAINER. Area themes, obstacles, floor textures, and music are randomized. Shop prices vary wildly. The challenge appears invisible in the Challenge List.
